# Extracao: transcription_mp4_2__Power_Base

- **Fonte:** transcription_mp4_2__Power_Base.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

What we're going to do here in this chapter is make a list of your power base. This is very simple. Who's in your power base? Number one is your family. I want you to think about you and then go out to the people closest to you all the way out. First, immediate family. Extended family. Who would extended family be? A brother you hadn't been in contact with. Uncles. Anns. Okay, don't get all sentimental here. Grandparents. Anybody in your extended family. Next, friends. Anybody that you consider a friend now? Yesterday? Three months ago? Friends. That's part of your power base. Everybody's got one. Neighbors will be next. Who are your immediate neighbors? Both neighbors around you now and maybe past neighbors. Then community. Who involves your whole community? In addition to your friends, family, extended family, friends, neighbors, who's in the community? Maybe the PTA? The school your kids go to? Who belongs to that thing you call community? And church. What church do you go to? Who are the members there? What I want you to do now is do not move on without making a list of your power base.
